violations.text: Chlorine sanitizer solution w in excess of 200 parts per million (ppm) was being used on cutting boards. A chlorine sanitizer solution applied to food contact surfaces must be between 50-100 ppm. Proper sanitizing procedures reviewed with PIC. Proper chlorine solution was made at the time of inspection. The 3-bay dispenser may also be used to sanitize food contact surfaces such as cutting boards. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 01/07/2026

Potatoes were observed held at 108 degrees Fahrenheit. Time/temperature control for safety (TCS) food must be maintained at 135 degrees Fahrenheit or above except during preparation, cooking, or cooling. PIC reheated product. Corrected On-Site. New Violation. Correct By: 08/27/2024
The receptacle in the restroom is lacking a cover. A toilet room used by females shall be provided with a covered receptacle for sanitary napkins. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2023
The door to the restroom is not self-closing. New Violation. Correct By: 08/25/2023
